task_description: Write an RFP response for a state government agency seeking a cloud migration partner to modernize their legacy systems.

input_data.responding_company: CloudPath Consulting (mid-size cloud consultancy, AWS Advanced Partner, 200 employees)

rfp_requirements.scope: Migrate 15 legacy COBOL/mainframe applications to cloud-native architecture on AWS. Applications handle tax filing, payment processing, refund management, and taxpayer accounts.
key_requirements: Maximum 4 hours downtime per application cutover
Staff augmentation and knowledge transfer to state IT team
PCI DSS compliance for payment processing components
